plan.title: SAM3: Remove Stub, Add GPU VRAM Enforcement, Progressive Documentation
plan.context:
The _StubSam3Encoder created a silent-failure scenario: training ran to completion producing meaningful-looking metrics from random weights. User directive (2026-03-07): "Always use pretrained weights! And never the stub."
This plan: 1. Removes _StubSam3Encoder and all use_stub paths entirely 2. Adds llmfit-style GPU VRAM check (16 GB minimum) that fires before any SAM3 load 3. Creates progressive disclosure documentation

task.name: Remove _StubSam3Encoder and use_stub from all adapters
task.description:
Remove _StubMLP, _StubSam3Encoder, _StubFPNNeck from sam3_backbone.py; _StubSam3Decoder from sam3_decoder.py; use_stub param from Sam3Backbone, Sam3VanillaAdapter, Sam3TopoLoraAdapter, Sam3HybridAdapter, Sam3MaskDecoder, extract_and_cache_features; remove _auto_stub_sam3() and pretrained:false path from model_builder.py.
Existing tests in tests/v2/unit/test_sam3_*.py updated to use pytest.mark.skipif(not _sam3_package_available(), reason="SAM3 not installed"). TestStubSam3Encoder class removed entirely.
New anti-stub tests in tests/unit/adapters/test_no_sam3_stub.py.
task.tdd_spec: RED: Write tests/unit/adapters/test_no_sam3_stub.py first: - test_stub_encoder_class_does_not_exist - test_stub_mlp_class_does_not_exist - test_stub_fpn_neck_class_does_not_exist - test_stub_decoder_class_does_not_exist - test_sam3_vanilla_has_no_use_stub_param - test_sam3_topolora_has_no_use_stub_param - test_sam3_hybrid_has_no_use_stub_param - test_sam3_backbone_has_no_use_stub_param - test_build_adapter_raises_without_sam3_installed GREEN: Remove stub classes and use_stub params from all files. Update existing tests.

task.name: Add sam3_vram_check.py with GPU VRAM enforcement
task.description: Create src/minivess/adapters/sam3_vram_check.py with check_sam3_vram(variant) that raises RuntimeError when gpu_vram_mb < 16384. Call it at top of build_adapter() for all SAM3 families.
task.tdd_spec: RED: Write tests/unit/adapters/test_sam3_vram_check.py first: - test_raises_when_vram_below_16gb - test_passes_when_vram_meets_16gb - test_passes_at_exactly_16gb_boundary - test_error_message_includes_detected_vram - test_error_message_includes_variant_name GREEN: Create sam3_vram_check.py and integrate into model_builder.py.

task.name: Progressive documentation
task.description: Create src/minivess/adapters/CLAUDE.md. Update docs/adr/0006-sam3-variant-architecture.md. Update root CLAUDE.md SAM3 section. Update LEARNINGS.md with 2026-03-07 stub removal entry.
task.tdd_spec: No TDD spec (documentation-only task). Verify: all files created/updated, content is accurate.
